Event.info: [chrome-mal-ids] ShadyPanda Phase 1/2 affiliate fraud + search hijacking — 22 malicious extension(s)

Attribute.comment: Name: ShadyPanda affiliate fraud extension | Threat: adware,click-fraud,data-theft | ShadyPanda Phase 1/2 affiliate fraud + search hijacking. Injected affiliate codes on eBay/Amazon/Booking.com clicks. Phase 2 extensions hijacked searches via trovi.com, exfiltrated cookies/search quer
